allow: PowerShell(try { $conn = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\("localhost", 3306\); $conn.Close\(\); "MySQL accesible en puerto 3306" } catch { "MySQL NO accesible en puerto 3306: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($i = 0; while \($i -lt 30\) { $status = docker inspect --format "{{.State.Health.Status}}" portal_ies_db 2>$null; if \($status -eq "healthy"\) { "MySQL healthy after $i seconds"; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $i += 2 }; if \($i -ge 30\) { "Timeout esperando MySQL" })

PowerShell(try { $conn = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient\("localhost", 3306\); $conn.Close\(\); "MySQL accesible desde host en puerto 3306" } catch { "MySQL NO accesible desde host: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/health" -Method Get; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/v1/health" -Method Get; $r | ConvertTo-Json } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
